docket_entries.description: DECLARATION PURSUANT TO 585 CCP IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 78412998) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OSM TRADE STREET LP

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OSM TRADE STREET LP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KLAHN, TAYLOR THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: POSSESSION NO LONGER AT ISSUE $14,260.52 RENT, $1,350.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $694.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $16,304.52, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOC

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF OSM TRADE STREET LP AS TO DEFENDANT KLAHN, TAYLOR DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
